command:
delete from matchmaking_heartbeats
  where last_heartbeat < now() - interval '15 seconds';

  delete from matchmaking_queue
  where uid in (
    select q.uid 
    from matchmaking_queue q
    left join matchmaking_heartbeats h on h.uid = q.uid
    where h.uid is null 
    or h.last_heartbeat < now() - interval '15 seconds'
  )
  and status = 'waiting';
